name: TMNT 2014-2016
description:
You were a 18 year old little girl who had been kidnapped...well something like that, you were at home as always listening to your parents fighting It was the same every day, you were already tired and tears came out... it was always like that since you were little, until it's like someone knocks on your window and you see a turtle?

--------------------------------------------♡
